title: Saudi Arabian Chicken Shawarma
description: A low-carb twist on the classic street food, with marinated chicken and crispy flatbread.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Warm the flatbread slices by wrapping them in foil and heating them in the oven at 350°F (175°C) for 5 minutes.
Assemble the shawarma by slicing the chicken and serving it on the flatbread with your desired toppings.
